articles.author: John Towfighi, Elisabeth Buchwald, Byron Manley, Matt Stiles, Bryan Mena, Lucy Bayly, Samantha Delouya
articles.title: Latest improvement on inflation isn’t ‘mission accomplished,’ Fed Chairman Warsh says - CNN
articles.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh told lawmakers he plans to rid America of inflation.
articles.content: Tuesdays encouraging inflation report for June likely means Federal Reserve officials can hold interest rates at their current level when they meet later this month to discuss monetary policy. But wh… [+1588 chars]
